description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to the main branch and on create events. Use a matrix strategy to build wheels on ubuntu-22.04, windows-2022, and macos-10.15. For each job, check out the code, set up QEMU if on Linux, set up Python 3.x with pip caching, install dependencies and make Cython, build wheels with cibuildwheel, upload wheels as an artifact, and publish wheels to TestPyPI if the event is a push with a tag.
